errors.adblock: Please support us by disabling your ad blocker.

not_found.title: Not Found
not_found.description: The page you are looking for does not exist. Try searching for what you need below.

errors.error_404: The page you're looking for doesn't exist or has been moved.
errors.error_generic: Something went wrong while loading this page.
errors.offline_description: No internet connection detected. Please check your connection and try again.
errors.went_offline: You're offline. Some features may not work.

customizer.title: Customize
customizer.prompt: Pick a style and color for the docs.

cta.start_writing: Start writing in {fileLink} to see this page taking shape.

footer.tagline: We craft digital experiences that grow with you.
footer.copyright: © {year} No Name Studio. All rights reserved.
footer.centered_copyright: © {year} Developed by No Name Studio. All rights reserved.

blog.title: Stories & Insights
blog.subtitle: Tutorials, engineering deep-dives, and design thinking from our team.
blog.no_results_description: Try adjusting your search or filter to find what you're looking for.
blog.seo_description: Insights, tutorials, and updates from No Name Studio.

nav.no_matching_desc: Try another keyword, or search the library directly.

home.title: Find the show, choose the session, keep your seat.
home.subtitle: TicketRush handles reserved seating, real-time holds, and checkout countdowns so you can secure tickets the moment sales open.
home.featured_subtitle: Curated picks our system is tracking right now — flash sales, high-demand sessions, and freshly published lineups.
home.organizer_title: Launch, manage, and sell — end to end.
home.organizer_subtitle: TicketRush gives event teams a private admin workspace with real-time seat control, queue management, and instant order visibility.

events.title: Every live event, one search away.
events.subtitle: Filter by status, date, or keyword and jump straight into booking when sales are open.
events.no_results_title: No events match the current filters.
events.no_results_subtitle: Adjust the search criteria, remove some filters, or browse the full catalog.

event_detail.about_title: Choose the date that fits your plans.
event_detail.sessions_subtitle: Each session has its own start time, ticket releases, and seat map access.
event_detail.sessions_empty: Sessions will appear here once the organizer publishes the schedule.
event_detail.organizer_note_desc: Review session details before choosing seats.
event_detail.organizer_note_body: Ticket availability and seating are managed per session. Select a date above to continue with the correct schedule.
event_detail.ticket_releases_empty: Ticket releases will appear once sales are configured.

seats.seats_held_info: Seats are held for 10 minutes. Choose seats for this session before continuing to checkout.
seats.selection_summary_desc: Choose up to 10 seats, then continue straight to checkout.
seats.reserved_for_checkout: Reserved for checkout after you continue.
seats.pick_seats_prompt: Pick seats from the map to build your order.
seats.seats_taken_error: One or more selected seats were taken by another customer.
seats.seats_conflict_error: Some of the selected seats are no longer available. We refreshed the map for you.
seats.checkout_error: We could not open checkout. Please try again.

seatmap.title: Seat map
seatmap.admin_desc: Shared layout data powers this map and the venue editor, keeping section structure consistent.
seatmap.interactive_desc: Focus sections, inspect seats, and keep your selection in one stable checkout flow.
seatmap.preview_desc: Review live availability and pricing before entering the reservation flow.
seatmap.no_layout: Seat layout is not available yet.
seatmap.no_layout_desc: Ticket releases and live availability will appear here once inventory is published.
seatmap.click_to_inspect: Click a seat to inspect it
seatmap.desc_available_interactive: This seat can be added to the current checkout selection.
seatmap.desc_available: This seat can still be secured once you enter live selection.
seatmap.desc_locked: Another buyer is holding this seat during an active checkout window.
seatmap.desc_sold: This position has already been converted into a completed order.
seatmap.desc_unavailable: This location is currently not being released for public purchase.

tickets.title: Your issued passes, ready whenever doors open.
tickets.subtitle: Every confirmed order lands here with its digital QR token and purchase metadata.
tickets.empty_title: Your first issued ticket will appear here.
tickets.empty_subtitle: Once you confirm a checkout, TicketRush stores the QR pass, seat assignment, and event timing in this wallet automatically.
tickets.detail_subtitle: Your digital pass is ready for entry. Keep this QR available at the door and review the event details below before arrival.
tickets.admission_doors_tba: Doors open time will be announced by the organizer.
tickets.admission_bring_qr: Bring this QR code and the attendee email used during checkout.
tickets.missing_title: We could not find that ticket.
tickets.missing_subtitle: The pass may have been removed, or this link may not belong to your account.

waiting_room.title: Stay here while we pace access to the seat map.
waiting_room.subtitle: TicketRush is admitting customers in small batches so the inventory stays correct and the purchase flow feels stable.
waiting_room.status_note: Please keep this page open. We refresh your status automatically and will move you into the seat map once your window opens.
waiting_room.leave_error: We could not leave the queue right now
waiting_room.join_error: We could not join the waiting room. Please try again.
waiting_room.connection_error: We lost contact with the queue for a moment. We will keep retrying automatically.

passkey.dialog_desc: Create a passkey for faster and more secure authentication
passkey.what_is_desc: A passkey is a secure, passwordless way to sign in using your device's biometric authentication (fingerprint, face recognition) or security key.
passkey.later_note: You can create a passkey later in your account settings.

events.title: Events
events.desc: Track drafts, publish state, and launch activity.
events.catalog_desc: Events currently in the admin catalog.
events.drafts_desc: Events still being shaped before launch.
events.live_desc: Public events that are available to buyers.
events.unfinished_draft_desc: This incomplete event form has not been saved as a real draft event yet.
events.registry_desc: Search launches and update their status.
events.no_match: No events match the current view.
events.no_match_desc: Adjust the search or create a new event.

event_create.choose_venue_prompt: Choose a venue to generate ticket releases and preview the layout.
event_create.autosave_load_error: We could not load the autosave draft
event_create.autosave_check_error: We could not check for autosave drafts
event_create.autosave_convert_warning: Event saved, but the autosave draft could not be marked as converted
event_create.save_error: We could not save the event draft
event_create.jump_error: Complete the current step before jumping ahead

users.title: Users
users.desc: Manage accounts, roles, and recent access activity.
users.no_match: No users match the current view.
users.no_match_desc: Adjust the search or add a new account.
users.delete_user_desc: Are you sure you want to delete user "{username}"? This action cannot be undone.
users.delete_batch_desc: Are you sure you want to delete {count} user(s)? This action cannot be undone.
users.password_edit_placeholder: Leave blank to keep current password
users.password_edit_note: Only fill this if you want to change the password
users.admin_desc: Mark as an admin user with elevated permissions
users.save_failed: Failed to save the user record
users.load_failed: Failed to load the user records
users.delete_failed: Failed to delete the user record
users.batch_delete_failed: Failed to delete the selected users

venues.title: Venues
venues.desc: Manage reusable room layouts and blueprint coverage.
venues.no_match: No venue blueprints match the current view.
venues.no_match_desc: Adjust the search or add a new venue.
venues.create_desc: Add the venue details first. Configure sections, rows, and seats in Venue Studio after creation.
venues.create_failed: Failed to save the venue blueprint

dashboard.placeholder: Your personal dashboard will appear here once your first order is processed.
